messages.text: Heads up: nobody has scheduled the checkout QA pass with me. I need a full day before any launch sign-off, and there's nothing on my calendar.
PR-88 (Enterprise Checkout v2) has been waiting on review for 5 days. @sarah @mike can one of you take a look? It's the launch blocker.
CHK-101 (Amex 500) and CHK-102 (double charge) are still open. CHK-102 is risky — it can double-charge customers. I wouldn't ship payments with these open.
Go/No-Go is Thursday 3pm. I need a straight answer Thursday morning on whether Friday is real.
Reminder: benefits enrollment closes next Friday.
